prerequisites.value: Improved Bull Rush, Merciless Rush, worshiper of an evil god.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you make a bull rush attack and your check exceeds the targetâs CMD by 5 or more, you can choose to expend one of the increments of 5 feet you would normally move the target back to instead attempt to trip the target as a part of your bull rush action. This does not provoke an attack of opportunity.
